name: Elder Soren
text: We have long awaited your arrival

name: Elder Soren
text: You are the destined child, the peacebringer

name: Elder Soren
text: Set out on a journey you shall, and you shall bring us peace

name: Elder Soren
text: The peacekeepers of this land are from our capitol, The Yunion...

name: Elder Soren
text: But monsters have seized it, bringing terror upon our lands...

name: Elder Soren
text: You must reach the Yunion, and bring us peace...

name: Elder Soren
text: Jump down into the abyss east of town... There your journey will begin
